'''Khoehng Heights''' was a mountain named after the play, [[Uhl Eharl Khoehng (play)|''Uhl Eharl Khoehng'']], performed beneath it. It was located on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Trulalis]].<ref name="Uhl Eharl Khoehng" />
